title: The Moment Earth is Furthest from the Sun

scenes.text: Earth recently reached its maximum distance from the Sun!
This event, known as aphelion, happens once a year.
At this point, Earth is about 152 million kilometers away from the Sun.
This distance affects climate patterns on Earth.
scenes.label: CLIMATE AFFECTS

scenes.text: Follow for daily science that blows your mind.

description: Earth just reached its aphelion, 152 million kilometers from the Sun. This distance affects climate patterns. Follow for more amazing Earth facts!
